title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates family as a Risk Analyst in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
